title: 必须对 AI 进行严肃的绩效考核
content: The author proposes applying software engineer performance metrics to evaluate AI tools like Copilot, noting a 10x price increase and inconsistent output quality. Instead of relying on programmer intuition, metrics could include estimated versus actual "person-hours" spent and estimated versus actual token/dollar costs for tasks. These evaluations could even be fed back to AI systems through agent settings to improve performance.
eventKey: 必须对-进行严肃的绩效考核
normalizedTitle: 必须对 ai 进行严肃的绩效考核

title: Balaji and Steven Glinert on Network States, Supply Chains, and Allied Coalition Strategy
content: Balaji Srinivasan and Steven Glinert discuss shifting global power dynamics between nations, networks, and technology with hosts Theo Jaffee and Sophia Puccini. Topics include China's industrial growth, U.S. manufacturing decline, alliance strategies in a multipolar world, and the internet's emergence as an independent political force. They examine supply chains, technological sovereignty, decentralization, and competing future global order visions. Srinivasan presents concepts from his Network State and Network School frameworks.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Sophia Puccini, Theo Jaffee, Steven Glinert, Balaji Srinivasan)

title: 迈瑞这一刀，我挨得心服口服
content:
迈瑞成本近200，现价144，浮亏近30%。仓位近3成。

这笔亏损，是我投资生涯里值得记住的一课。

不是因为它亏得多，而是因为它把我所有的毛病——贪婪、急躁、幻想、傲慢，全都翻了出来。

一、买得太快

title: 16亿Windows用户，一夜冲进Agent时代
content: At Microsoft Build 2026, CEO Satya Nadella announced Windows as the premier platform for AI agents. Key launches include: Copilot merging Chat, Cowork, Code, and new Autopilots into a unified super-app; Scout, the first enterprise-grade autonomous agent with its own identity and license; OpenClaw integration via MXC, an OS-level agent sandbox with tiered isolation; seven proprietary MAI models spanning reasoning, coding, image, and voice; Surface RTX Spark laptops with 1 petaflop local AI compute running multi-model inference offline; and quantum chip Majorana 2 with 1000x improved qubit reliability.

title: 别盯着GPU了，英特尔甩出重磅大招，能否终结英伟达的算力垄断？
content: Intel argues that Agentic AI will reshape data center computing by shifting CPU-to-GPU ratios from 1:8 toward 1:1, as intelligent agents require continuous task orchestration rather than single-round inference. At COMPUTEX 2026, Intel launched Xeon 6+ processors built on its 18A process, offering up to 288 efficiency cores and 576MB cache for cloud-native and agent workloads. The company also introduced a decoupled inference architecture with partners, assigning CPUs to orchestration, SambaNova RDUs to decoding, and NVIDIA GPUs to prefilling. Intel is additionally pushing custom chips for industry-specific needs and expanding Core Ultra processors for edge and on-device AI.
eventKey: 别盯着gpu了-英特尔甩出重磅大招-能否终结英伟达的算力垄断
normalizedTitle: 别盯着gpu了 英特尔甩出重磅大招 能否终结英伟达的算力垄断

title: 36氪独家 | 火山引擎提升MaaS营收目标至全年150亿元，Seedance 2.0单月营收已超10亿元
content: Volcano Engine raised its 2026 MaaS revenue target to 15 billion yuan, up from 10 billion yuan at the end of 2025 and roughly 10 times its 2025 actual revenue of about 1.5 billion yuan. The surge is driven almost entirely by Seedance 2.0, its video generation model, which now generates over 1 billion yuan in monthly revenue and holds about 95% penetration in China's short-drama industry. Daily token consumption continues growing nearly 40% monthly. Meanwhile, Volcano lags in coding models, where Zhipu AI has gained ground through strong GLM-5.1 coding capabilities.

title: 腾讯接近推出微信 AI 助手
content: Tencent is nearing the launch of a WeChat AI assistant, with prototype testing underway. The feature would help users complete tasks within the app, and compliance procedures for an official launch could begin as early as this month. News of the development sent Tencent's stock up over 10% on June 2, marking its largest single-day gain since November 2022.

title: 黄仁勋：Marvell 可能会成为「下一家万亿美元公司」
content: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang said Marvell Technology could become the "next trillion-dollar company" during a Computex 2026 panel with Marvell CEO Matt Murphy. Huang noted that as Agent AI scales, computing is shifting from GPUs alone to coordinated data-center-wide operations, making high-speed interconnects, switching chips, and optical communications—Marvell's core businesses—increasingly critical in an era of distributed, disaggregated AI infrastructure.
